calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-15-2016 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk KTom. Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-29-2016 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-29-2016 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jun-14-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Amended Notice Of Hearing For Right To Attach Order; Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Mar-29-2016 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Attorneys Jack Praetzellis and L. P. Ryan of Elite Audio Systems, Inc 415-364-5540 for Plaintiff Elite Audio Systems, Inc. the moving party.
Attorney Trevor Caudle 415-260-0947 for Defendant Dsegnare, LLC the opposing party.

After hearing arguments from both parties in the matter of PLAINTIFF ELITE AUDIO SYSTEMS, INC. Amended Notice Of Hearing For Right To Attach Order; Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment; The Court takes this matter under submission. Both parties are to submit proposed orders to the Court. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported. (501)

Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order
Off Calendar Mar-23-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Not Reported.

No appearances.

The Court Adopts the Tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ELITE AUDIO SYSTEMS, INC. Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order is OFF CALENDAR, re-noticed for March 25, 2016.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-09-2015 Set For Trial On Apr-18-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
